login.invalidCode: Invalid verification code, please try again

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailSentDescription: If an account exists for {email}, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.linkExpired: This reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.updateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

walletSelect.title: Add to Wallet
walletSelect.subtitle: Choose your wallet to add the demo loyalty card
walletSelect.tip: For the best experience, scan the QR code directly with your phone
